findings.title: Ukraine says ready to work with Baltic states, Finland on airspace security after drone incidents
findings.summary: Kyiv says Russian electronic warfare diverted Ukrainian drones from intended targets
findings.text: Ukraine says ready to work with Baltic states, Finland on airspace security after drone incidents | Kyiv says Russian electronic warfare diverted Ukrainian drones from intended targets

findings.title: Ukraine resumes fuel imports from Hungary and Slovakia – expert
findings.summary: Ukraine has resumed fuel imports from Hungary and Slovakia, though this will not affect domestic market prices.
findings.text: Ukraine resumes fuel imports from Hungary and Slovakia – expert | Ukraine has resumed fuel imports from Hungary and Slovakia, though this will not affect domestic market prices.

findings.title: War initiative has shifted in Ukraine's favor for first time in nearly three years – The Economist
findings.summary: For the first time in nearly three years of Russia's full-scale war against Ukraine, the initiative in the conflict has shifted in Ukraine's favor.
findings.text: War initiative has shifted in Ukraine's favor for first time in nearly three years – The Economist | For the first time in nearly three years of Russia's full-scale war against Ukraine, the initiative in the conflict has shifted in Ukraine's favor.

findings.title: Ukraine ready to send expert team to Finland after drone incidents – Sybiha
findings.summary: During a meeting with Finnish Foreign Minister Elina Valtonen in Brussels, Ukrainian Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha confirmed Ukraine's willingness to dispatch a team of experts to Finland to share its experience and help strengthen airspace protection.
findings.text: Ukraine ready to send expert team to Finland after drone incidents – Sybiha | During a meeting with Finnish Foreign Minister Elina Valtonen in Brussels, Ukrainian Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha confirmed Ukraine's willingness to dispatch a team of experts to Finland to share its experience and help strengthen airspace protection.

findings.title: Ukraine's Khartiia units improve tactical position on Vovchansk axis
findings.summary: Units of the 2nd Corps of the National Guard of Ukraine, known as Khartiia, conducted local strike-and-search operations in the Vovchansk sector, which enabled them to clear Russian positions and improve the tactical situation for Ukrainian forces.
findings.text: Ukraine's Khartiia units improve tactical position on Vovchansk axis | Units of the 2nd Corps of the National Guard of Ukraine, known as Khartiia, conducted local strike-and-search operations in the Vovchansk sector, which enabled them to clear Russian positions and improve the tactical situation for Ukrainian forces.

findings.title: Germany seeks to expand joint deep strike weapons production with Ukraine – Pistorius
findings.summary: Germany intends to expand joint production with Ukraine in the field of deep strike capabilities, according to German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius.
findings.text: Germany seeks to expand joint deep strike weapons production with Ukraine – Pistorius | Germany intends to expand joint production with Ukraine in the field of deep strike capabilities, according to German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius.

findings.title: CinC Syrskyi inspects Khartia Corps near Kupiansk, orders focus on drones, logistics, fortifications
findings.summary: Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, General Oleksandr Syrskyi visited the 2nd Corps of the National Guard of Ukraine Khartia and discussed the situation on the approaches to Kupiansk with its commanders.
findings.text: CinC Syrskyi inspects Khartia Corps near Kupiansk, orders focus on drones, logistics, fortifications | Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, General Oleksandr Syrskyi visited the 2nd Corps of the National Guard of Ukraine Khartia and discussed the situation on the approaches to Kupiansk with its commanders.

findings.title: Ukraine could receive first funds from €90 billion EU loan next week – Commissioner Kos
findings.summary: Ukraine may receive the first payments from the EU €90 billion loan as early as next week.
findings.text: Ukraine could receive first funds from €90 billion EU loan next week – Commissioner Kos | Ukraine may receive the first payments from the EU €90 billion loan as early as next week.

findings.title: EU could open all Ukraine negotiation clusters in July – Commissioner Kos
findings.summary: All clusters in Ukraine’s EU accession negotiations could be opened as early as July, while the first cluster may be launched by the end of June.
findings.text: EU could open all Ukraine negotiation clusters in July – Commissioner Kos | All clusters in Ukraine’s EU accession negotiations could be opened as early as July, while the first cluster may be launched by the end of June.

findings.title: Germany’s Defense Minister arrives in Kyiv
findings.summary: German Federal Minister of Defense Boris Pistorius arrived in the Ukrainian capital on an unannounced visit on Monday, May 11.
findings.text: Germany’s Defense Minister arrives in Kyiv | German Federal Minister of Defense Boris Pistorius arrived in the Ukrainian capital on an unannounced visit on Monday, May 11.

findings.title: Kharkiv region hands over batch of pickup trucks to two combat brigades
findings.summary: The Kharkiv region delivered a batch of pickup trucks to soldiers of the 92nd Assault Brigade and the 57th Separate Motorized Infantry Brigade of the Armed Forces of Ukraine.
findings.text: Kharkiv region hands over batch of pickup trucks to two combat brigades | The Kharkiv region delivered a batch of pickup trucks to soldiers of the 92nd Assault Brigade and the 57th Separate Motorized Infantry Brigade of the Armed Forces of Ukraine.

findings.title: Germany news: Defense minister Pistorius arrives in Kyiv
findings.summary: Pistorius plans to discuss building a new weapons system with Ukraine in the unannounced visit. Meanwhile in Stuttgart, five pro-Palestinian activists face trial over attacking an Israeli defense company site. Follow DW.
findings.text: Germany news: Defense minister Pistorius arrives in Kyiv | Pistorius plans to discuss building a new weapons system with Ukraine in the unannounced visit. Meanwhile in Stuttgart, five pro-Palestinian activists face trial over attacking an Israeli defense company site. Follow DW.

findings.title: Ukrainische Infanterie: 130 Tage in der Todeszone
findings.summary: An der Front sind ukrainische Soldaten oft monatelang auf sich allein gestellt. Jede Bewegung kann tödlich sein. Armeechef Syrskyj ordnete nun die Ablösung nach maximal zwei Monaten an - in der Praxis unrealistisch, meinen Experten. Von R. Barth.
findings.text: Ukrainische Infanterie: 130 Tage in der Todeszone | An der Front sind ukrainische Soldaten oft monatelang auf sich allein gestellt. Jede Bewegung kann tödlich sein. Armeechef Syrskyj ordnete nun die Ablösung nach maximal zwei Monaten an - in der Praxis unrealistisch, meinen Experten. Von R. Barth.

findings.title: Pistorius will neue Waffensysteme mit der Ukraine bauen
findings.summary: Bundesverteidigungsminister Pistorius ist zu Gesprächen in der Ukraine eingetroffen. Es geht um die Stärkung der deutsch-ukrainischen Partnerschaft - vor allem bei der Entwicklung von unbemannten Waffen.
findings.text: Pistorius will neue Waffensysteme mit der Ukraine bauen | Bundesverteidigungsminister Pistorius ist zu Gesprächen in der Ukraine eingetroffen. Es geht um die Stärkung der deutsch-ukrainischen Partnerschaft - vor allem bei der Entwicklung von unbemannten Waffen.

findings.title: EU backs Ukraine war compensation, funds from Russian frozen assets up for debate
findings.summary: Canada is also expected to sign the convention establishing the International Claims Commission during a visit to Brussels on May 11, which would make it the first non-European country to do so.
findings.text: EU backs Ukraine war compensation, funds from Russian frozen assets up for debate | Canada is also expected to sign the convention establishing the International Claims Commission during a visit to Brussels on May 11, which would make it the first non-European country to do so.

findings.title: German defense minister visits Kyiv to discuss joint arms production
findings.summary: "The focus is on the joint development of state-of-the-art unmanned systems across all ranges, particularly in the area of deep strike," German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius told DPA.
findings.text: German defense minister visits Kyiv to discuss joint arms production | "The focus is on the joint development of state-of-the-art unmanned systems across all ranges, particularly in the area of deep strike," German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius told DPA.

findings.title: Estonia tells Kyiv to tighten drone control after Ukraine offers experts over aerial incidents
findings.summary: Ukraine has offered to send experts to the Baltic states to help strengthen air security following several drone-related incidents, Estonian public broadcaster ERR reported on May 9.
findings.text: Estonia tells Kyiv to tighten drone control after Ukraine offers experts over aerial incidents | Ukraine has offered to send experts to the Baltic states to help strengthen air security following several drone-related incidents, Estonian public broadcaster ERR reported on May 9.

findings.title: Another NATO state urges Ukraine to control its drones
findings.summary: Ukraine should not be using Estonian airspace for drone attacks on Russia, the Baltic nation’s defense minister has said Read Full Article at RT.com
findings.text: Another NATO state urges Ukraine to control its drones | Ukraine should not be using Estonian airspace for drone attacks on Russia, the Baltic nation’s defense minister has said Read Full Article at RT.com

findings.title: US might move its troops from Germany to another EU nation – Trump
findings.summary: US President Trump says American troops might be moved to Poland from Germany after Berlin’s refusal to back the US-Israeli war on Iran Read Full Article at RT.com
findings.text: US might move its troops from Germany to another EU nation – Trump | US President Trump says American troops might be moved to Poland from Germany after Berlin’s refusal to back the US-Israeli war on Iran Read Full Article at RT.com
